---
title: "Research"
---

<i class="bi bi-book-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Audit in the Dark: Auditor Responses to Risk in the Absence of Authoritative Guidance** (***with Beatriz García Osma, Nhan Ha, and W. Robert Knechel***)

<i class="bi bi-book-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Auditor Consequences of Opinion Selling** (***with Beatriz García Osma and Encarna Guillamon-Saorin***)

<i class="bi bi-book-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Does Audit Firm Communication Matter? The Role of Knowledge Compatibility** (***with Beatriz García Osma and Nhan Ha***)

<i class="bi bi-book-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **The Spillover Effects of SEC Monitoring on Auditor Disclosures** (***with Nhan Ha***)

<i class="bi bi-book-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Audit Materiality and Debt Contracting** (***with Beatriz García Osma, Encarna Guillamon-Saorin, and Omar De Ines Anton***)
